zh.lifeSummary: 當Beatrice d'Anjou du Maine於大約1132年出生在法國帕斯 德 拉 洛易麥-吉洛易薩特時，她的父親Élie II d'Anjou, comte du Maine House of Anjou19歲，母親Countess Philippa de Perche23歲。她和Jean d'Alençon I至少有4個兒子和3個女兒。她去世於1190年享年59歲。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Beatrice d'Anjou du Maine于大约1132年出生在法国帕斯 德 拉 洛易麥-吉洛易薩特时，她的父亲Élie II d'Anjou, comte du Maine House of Anjou19岁，母亲Countess Philippa de Perche23岁。她和Jean d'Alençon I至少有4个儿子和3个女儿。她去世于1190年享年59岁。

nameMeanings.name: d'Anjou
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: French: habitational name, with fused preposition d(e) ‘from’, for someone from Anjou, a former province of western France (see Langevin ).

variants.name: Langevin
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  French Armand, Normand, Andre, Henri, Jean-Louis, Pierre, Adelard, Emile, Gaston, Leodore, Lucien, Marcel.

French: habitational name, with fused definite article l', for an Angevin, i.e. for someone from Anjou, a former province of western France that was ruled by a count as an independent territory from the 10th century. The province became a property of the English Crown for fifty years at the end of the 12th century. Compare Longway and Lonsway .

History: Mathurin Langevin dit Lacroix from Le Lude in Sarthe, France, married Marie-Thérèse Martin in Quebec City, QC, in 1674. Michel Langevin from Paris, France, married Marguerite Guertin in Contrecoeur, QC, in 1714. Jean Bergevin dit Langevin from Angers in Maine-et-Loire, France, married Marie Piton in Quebec City, QC, in 1668. Charles Citoleux/Sitoleux dit Langevin from Chambellay in Maine-et-Loire, France, married Marie-Louise Harel in Montreal, QC, in 1739.

nameMeanings.name: Beatrice
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: and French form of   Beatrix  , which was quite popular in England during the Middle Ages, and strongly revived in the 19th century. It is most famous as the name of Dante's beloved, and is borne by the elder (  b. 1988 ) of the Duke of York's daughters.

en.lifeSummary: When Beatrice d'Anjou du Maine was born about 1132, in Sarthe, Maine-et-Loire, Pays de la Loire, France, her father, Élie II d'Anjou, comte du Maine House of Anjou, was 19 and her mother, Countess Philippa de Perche, was 23. She had at least 4 sons and 3 daughters with Jean d'Alençon I. She died in 1190, at the age of 59.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Beatrice d'Anjou du Maine est née environ 1132, à Sarthe, Maine-et-Loire, Pays de la Loire, France, son père, Élie II d'Anjou, comte du Maine House of Anjou, avait 19 ans et sa mère, Countess Philippa de Perche, avait 23 ans. Elle a eu au moins 4 fils et 3 filles avec Jean d'Alençon I. Elle est décédée en 1190, à l’âge de 59 ans.

de.lifeSummary: Als Beatrice d'Anjou du Maine um 1132 in Sarthe, Maine-et-Loire, Pays de la Loire, Frankreich geboren wurde, war ihr Vater Élie II d'Anjou, comte du Maine House of Anjou 19 und ihre Mutter Countess Philippa de Perche 23. Sie hatte mit Jean d'Alençon I mindestens 4 Söhne und 3 Töchter. Sie starb 1190 im Alter von 59 Jahren.

Lei avuto almeno 4 figli e 3 figlie con Jean d'Alençon I. Morì nel 1190, all'età di 59 anni.

ja.lifeSummary: Beatrice d'Anjou du Maineが約1132年にフランスペイズ ド ラ ロイアーメインエ-エト-ロイアーサルスで生まれた時，父Élie II d'Anjou, comte du Maine House of Anjouは19歳，母Countess Philippa de Percheは23歳であった。彼女はJean d'Alençon Iとの間に少なくとも4人の息子と3人の娘をもうけた。彼女は1190年に59歳で死去した。

ko.Sarthe, Maine-et-Loire, Pays de la Loire: 프랑스 파이스 데 라 로이르 맹-트-로이르 사르테
ko.lifeSummary: Beatrice d'Anjou du Maine(이)가 대략 1132년 프랑스 파이스 데 라 로이르 맹-트-로이르 사르테에서 태어났을 때, 그녀의 아버지 Élie II d'Anjou, comte du Maine House of Anjou(은)는 19세였고, 그녀의 어머니 Countess Philippa de Perche(은)는 23세였다. 그녀는 Jean d'Alençon I(와)과 적어도 네 명의 아들과 세 명의 딸을 두었다. 그녀는 1190년 59세의 나이로 사망했다.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Beatrice d'Anjou du Maine родилась около 1132 г. в местности сарт, меине-ет-лоир, пеис де ла лоир, Франция, её отцу по имени Élie II d'Anjou, comte du Maine House of Anjou было 19 лет, а матери, которую звали Countess Philippa de Perche, 23. У неё было по крайней мере 4 сына и 3 дочери от Jean d'Alençon I. Она умерла в 1190 г. в возрасте 59 лет.
